it:33.3: "Dvīhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato puggalo yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge. Katamehi dvīhi? Bhaddakena ca sīlena, bhaddikāya ca diṭṭhiyā. Imehi kho, bhikkhave, dvīhi dhammehi samannāgato puggalo yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge"ti. Etamatthaṁ bhagavā avoca. Tatthetaṁ iti vuccati:
it:33.5:
Ayampi attho vutto bhagavatā, iti me sutanti.
Chaṭṭhaṁ.
